a: WhatsApp Business API (via providers like Route Mobile, AiSensy, SendPulse)

c.d: Number of contacts to whom messages can be broadcasted simultaneously.
Ability to personalize messages with customer-specific data (e.g., name, location).
Availability of automated workflows, scheduling, and triggered messages.
Integration capabilities with other platforms (e.g., CRM, e-commerce).
Availability of analytics and reporting on message performance (e.g., open rates, reply rates).
Features ensuring compliance with SMS marketing regulations.
Pricing model and cost per message or subscription.
Supports other channels besides SMS such as Email, push notifications and other messengers.
